attributes.additional_details: Military veterans have served the United Kingdom with dedication and sacrifice. They deserve greater visible recognition and practical support, including while travelling. We call on the Government to work with airport operators, charities, and partners such as the Royal British Legion and SSAFA to establish dedicated lounges or quiet spaces for veterans in major UK airports.
attributes.background:
Create serving military/veteran lounges in international airports in the U.K. 
As some veterans because of their mental health, ptsd and/or anxiety cannot always be in crowds but it is also a safe space for veterans.

rejection.details: This is not a matter of responsibility for the Government but for airport operators and airlines.
